(2.25)} \\ \left. \begin{array}{l} \mathbf {v} := L \backslash \mathbf {k} _ {*} \\ 6: \mathbb {V} [ f _ {*} ] := k (\mathbf {x} _ {*}, \mathbf {x} _ {*}) - \mathbf {v} ^ {\top} \mathbf {v} \end{array} \right\} \text {predictive variance eq. (2.26)} \\ \log p (\mathbf {y} | X) := - \frac {1}{2} \mathbf {y} ^ {\top} \boldsymbol {\alpha} - \sum_ {i} \log L _ {i i} - \frac {n}{2} \log 2 \pi \\ 8: \text {return: f_{*}} (\text {mean}), \mathbb {V} [ f _ {*} ] (\text {variance}), \log p (\mathbf {y} | X) \log \text {marginal likelihood} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} \mathbf {x} \sim \mathcal {N} (\boldsymbol {\mu} _ {x}, A), & \text { and } \mathbf {x} | \mathbf {y} \sim \mathcal {N} \big (\boldsymbol {\mu} _ {x} + C B ^ {- 1} (\mathbf {y} - \boldsymbol {\mu} _ {y}), A - C B ^ {- 1} C ^ {\top} \big) \\ & \text { or } \mathbf {x} | \mathbf {y} \sim \mathcal {N} \big (\boldsymbol {\mu} _ {x} - \tilde {A} ^ {- 1} \tilde {C} (\mathbf {y} - \boldsymbol {\mu} _ {y}), \tilde {A} ^ {- 1} \big). \end{array} \tag {A}\tag{A.6}
